extraction.one_line_summary: GODOT Bjorg won from the breakaway after an 18-second gap inside 5km nearly closed, holding off sprinters by seconds after 5.5 hours racing.
tactical_patterns: Trek-Segafredo paced for sprint finish but miscalculated catch timing, allowing breakaway win despite 11-second gap at 2.5km remaining.
CLOUET Soren attacked solo from GC-7 position with 15km to go, revealing opportunistic GC raider tactics on transitional stages.
Final climb 10km from finish insufficient to shed sprinters; KISS and HAYTER still present suggesting categorized climb placement ineffective.

rider_signals.GODOT Bjorg: positive: First pro win at 23 for Total-NLG shows team desperate for results after Pidcock signing
rider_signals.CLOUET Soren: neutral: Solo adventure from 15km showed ambition but caught, signaling willingness to gamble from mid-GC position
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: negative: Chasing bonus sprint instead of controlling break reveals Jumbo-Visma complacency on transitional stages
rider_signals.HOLMES Matthew: neutral: Collecting KOM points on penultimate climb despite break being caught shows secondary competition tactical play
